name: Coomassie Blue Staining Solution

notes.en: Dissolve CBB in methanol first, then add acetic acid and water. Filter (0.45 µm) before use. Stain 1–4 h.
notes.zh: 先将 CBB 溶于甲醇，再加醋酸和水。使用前过滤 (0.45 µm)。染色 1–4 h。

ref: Gallagher (2012) Curr Protoc Mol Biol, Ch.10, Unit 10.6

usage.en: Coomassie Brilliant Blue R-250 staining solution for visualizing proteins in SDS-PAGE gels.
usage.zh: 考马斯亮蓝 R-250 染色液，用于 SDS-PAGE 胶中蛋白质可视化。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve Coomassie Brilliant Blue R-250 in methanol first.
prepSteps.warning: Methanol is toxic — handle in fume hood.

prepSteps.step: Bring to final volume with ddH₂O.
Stir until dye is completely dissolved.
Filter through Whatman No. 1 or 0.45 µm filter before use.
Store at room temperature; reuse multiple times.
